title: openssh security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[8.0p1-26.0.1]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 36587718]

[8.0p1-26]
- Fix missing invalid error code checks in OpenSSH. It prevents
  a MITM attack when VerifyHostKeyDNS is on (CVE-2025-26465)
  Resolves: RHEL-109228
full_text:
[8.0p1-26.0.1]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 36587718]

[8.0p1-26]
- Fix missing invalid error code checks in OpenSSH. It prevents
  a MITM attack when VerifyHostKeyDNS is on (CVE-2025-26465)
  Resolves: RHEL-109228

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-16823.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-26465.html
